variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 190187 Absolute Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO60015
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 190187 Absolute Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO60015
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 190187 Absolute Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO60015. Easy to install and replace, the SA 190187 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
